Healthy.description: The potato plant appears healthy with green leaves and no visible disease symptoms.
recommendations: Continue regular irrigation and nutrient management
Monitor the crop weekly for early signs of disease
preventive_measures: Practice crop rotation (avoid potato after potato)

Early_Blight.cause: Caused by the fungus Alternaria solani, commonly affecting older leaves first.
symptoms: Brown to black circular spots with concentric rings
treatment: Apply fungicides such as Mancozeb or Chlorothalonil as per label instructions
organic_control: Use neem oil spray (3–5 ml per liter of water)

Late_Blight.cause: Caused by the pathogen Phytophthora infestans, highly destructive if not controlled early.
symptoms: White fungal growth on underside of leaves
treatment: Apply systemic fungicides such as Metalaxyl or Cymoxanil
preventive_measures: Avoid late planting in disease-prone areas
